name: Tokai Kisen Co., Ltd.
summary: Tokai Kisen Co., Ltd. engages in the fleet service, trading, restaurant and hotel management, food and beverage, general passenger automobile carrier, and other businesses in Japan. The company was formerly known as Tokyo Wan Kisen Co., Ltd and changed its name to Tokai Kisen Co., Ltd. in August 1964. Tokai Kisen Co., Ltd. was founded in 1889 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
